title: Amtech T0725 50mm Security Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 50mm chrome plated security padlock has an 8mm diameter hardened steel shackle with a hardened double ball locking mechanism
VERSATILE: Supplied with 4 keys, it is ideal for a wide range of security applications
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 50mm Security Padlock See more
